name: Travelpayouts Travel Affiliate Data API
what_it_does: Travelpayouts travel affiliate data REST API for travel content creators, bloggers, travel agencies, and booking platforms to access flight price data, hotel availability, car rental prices, and tour packages from Travelpayouts' affiliate network (Jetradar, Aviasales, Hotellook, Rentalcars.com) with commission-based monetization through deeplinks and white-label widgets. Enables AI agents to manage flight price calendar data for cheapest date discovery automation, handle hotel availability search for accommodation comparison automation, access car rental price data for ground transport automation, retrieve destination inspiration for travel content automation, manage affiliate deeplink generation for monetized booking referral automation, handle price alert data for fare monitoring automation, access airport and route data for travel planning automation, retrieve historical price data for fare trend analysis automation, manage widget embedding for travel site monetization automation, and integrate Travelpayouts affiliate data with travel blogs, content sites, and OTAs for end-to-end travel affiliate monetization automation.
use_cases: Displaying cheapest flight dates on travel blog content from affiliate monetization agents
Embedding hotel price comparison widgets for travel content site automation agents
Generating affiliate deeplinks for flight and hotel bookings from travel creator agents
Analyzing historical flight price trends for route recommendation automation agents
not_for: Direct flight booking without affiliate relationship (use Duffel or Amadeus for direct booking)
Corporate travel management (Travelpayouts is consumer-facing affiliate, not corporate)
Real-time GDS fare access for ticketing (data is cached/aggregated, not live GDS)
best_when: A travel blogger, content site, or travel comparison platform wanting AI agents to display flight and hotel price data with affiliate link monetization through Travelpayouts' Jetradar and Aviasales data network.
avoid_when: DATA IS CACHED NOT REAL-TIME: Travelpayouts flight price data is aggregated and cached (typically minutes to hours old); automated real-time booking price assumption creates price mismatch at checkout; automated live-fare display from cache creates misleading price. AFFILIATE ACCOUNT REQUIRED FOR DEEPLINKS: Travelpayouts deeplink and widget generation requires affiliate account approval; automated monetized link generation without approved account creates non-monetized or broken links. TOKEN-BASED AUTH WITH RATE LIMITS: Travelpayouts API has tiered rate limits by affiliate tier; automated high-volume data retrieval on basic tier creates 429 throttling; automated premium-tier assumption creates unexpected rate limit. BOOKING HAPPENS ON PARTNER SITES: Travelpayouts data drives users to Jetradar/Aviasales/Hotellook for actual booking; automated end-to-end booking assumption within Travelpayouts creates redirect-required flow not inline booking.

auth.notes: Travelpayouts uses API token for authentication. REST API with JSON. Moscow/Limassol HQ. Founded 2011 (part of Aviasales/Go Travel Un Limited). Products: Jetradar, Aviasales, Hotellook, Rentalcars.com data. Flight price calendar, hotel search, car rental. SDKs: None official. Affiliate network with commission model. GDPR compliant. 300,000+ affiliates. Competes with Commission Junction Travel and Awin for travel affiliate data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free API access for affiliates; rate limits by tier
pricing.paid_tiers: Commission-based (3-7% on flights, 5-8% on hotels); no direct API fees for affiliates
pricing.notes: Limassol CY. Aviasales group. Commission-only affiliate model. Free API with rate limits.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits by affiliate tier: free tier 100 req/min, paid tiers higher; no webhooks

known_agent_gotchas: CACHED PRICES ARE NOT LIVE FARES: Travelpayouts flight data is aggregated cache (minutes to hours delay); automated real-time price display creates stale price shown to users; automated display must include last_updated timestamp and redirect to partner for live price

DOMAIN VERIFICATION FOR AFFILIATE LINKS: Travelpayouts affiliate deeplinks require registered domain in affiliate account; automated link generation for unregistered domain creates non-tracked links with no commission

CURRENCY IS CONFIGURABLE BUT LIMITED: Travelpayouts price data available in select currencies; automated multi-currency display must check supported currencies; automated arbitrary currency assumption creates unsupported_currency error

IATA CODES REQUIRED FOR AIRPORTS: Travelpayouts search requires IATA airport codes (JFK, LHR); automated city-name search without IATA lookup creates invalid_origin error; automated search must resolve city to IATA code first

HOTEL DATA IS HOTELLOOK NOT BOOKING: Travelpayouts hotel data comes from Hotellook aggregator not direct Booking.com/Expedia; automated parity assumption with direct OTAs creates price/availability discrepancy
agent_readiness.security_notes: Travel affiliate data. GDPR. API token. EU. User travel preferences and affiliate tracking data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Travel affiliate network. GDPR. API token. EU. Affiliate and user travel data.
